title: An Act to Establish a Monetary Penalty for Employers Whose Unemployment Payment Is Returned Unpaid
last_house_action: 3/26/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/30/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

actions.description: Committee on Labor suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on LABOR in concurrence

Reports READ . On motion of Representative ROEDER of Bangor, the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report was ACCEPTED . The Bill was READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-870) was READ and ADOPTED . Under suspension of the rules, the Bill was given its SECOND READING without REFERENCE to the Committee on Bills in the Second Reading . The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-870) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Reports Read On motion by Senator TIPPING of Penobscot the Majority Ought to Pass as Amended Report ACCEPTED . Bill READ ONCE. Committee Amendment "A" (H-870) READ and ADOPTED. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-870) in concurrence.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
